title: Tantei Mariko no Shôgai de Ichiban Hisan na Hi
original_title: 探偵マリコの生涯で一番悲惨な日
overview: A small bar in Tokyo's red-light district run by an undercover detective with a tragic past links together a group of eccentrics, a search for aliens, FBI investigators, bizarre love affairs and assassins.
